fields.name: messageId
fields.description: Unique identifier for this message exchange

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the message was created

fields.name: messageType
fields.description: Classification of the message content and intent

fields.name: payload
fields.description: Core business data for the lending decision override

children.name: loanApplicationId
children.description: Unique identifier for the loan application being overridden

children.name: customerId
children.description: Unique identifier for the customer applying for the loan

children.name: originalDecision
children.description: The initial credit decision made before override

children.name: overrideDecision
children.description: The new decision after risk and compliance override

children.name: overrideReason
children.description: Classification of the reason for the override decision

children.name: riskAssessmentDetails
children.description: Quantitative and qualitative risk factors supporting the override

children.name: creditScore
children.description: Customer's credit score at time of override assessment

children.name: debtToIncomeRatio
children.description: Ratio of total debt obligations to gross income

children.name: loanToValueRatio
children.description: Ratio of loan amount to collateral value

children.name: yearsOfIncome
children.description: Number of years of documented income history

children.name: mitigatingFactors
children.description: List of positive risk factors that support the override approval

children.name: factor
children.description: Description of a mitigating risk factor

children.name: overrideApprovalDetails
children.description: Authorization and conditions associated with the override approval

children.name: approvedBy
children.description: Unique identifier of the risk and compliance executive who approved the override

children.name: approvalLevel
children.description: Hierarchical level of authority required and granted for this override

children.name: approvalDate
children.description: Date on which the override was formally approved

children.name: conditions
children.description: List of mandatory conditions imposed on the approved loan

children.name: condition
children.description: Description of a condition required for loan approval

children.name: loanDetails
children.description: Core loan product and financial terms

children.name: loanAmount
children.description: Principal loan amount in the specified currency

children.name: currency
children.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the loan

children.name: loanTerm
children.description: Loan term in months

children.name: productType
children.description: Classification of the loan product

children.name: complianceFlags
children.description: Compliance and regulatory checks performed before override approval

children.name: amlCheckCompleted
children.description: Whether anti-money laundering checks have been completed

children.name: sanctionsCheckCompleted
children.description: Whether sanctions screening checks have been completed

children.name: creditPolicyWaiverRequired
children.description: Whether a formal credit policy waiver is required for this override

children.name: waiverDocumentReference
children.description: Reference identifier for the credit policy waiver document
